languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

languages.text: "А теперь..." {n}Тразин поднимает руку в патетическом жесте и делает театральную паузу.{/n} "...вон из моего Музеона".
"Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."
languages.original_text: "А теперь..." {n}Тразин поднимает руку в патетическом жесте и делает театральную паузу.{/n} "...вон из моего Музеона".

"Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

languages.text: 「さあ...」{n}トラザインは情熱的なジェスチャーで手を挙げ、劇的にポーズをとる.{/n}「...私のミュゼイオンから出て行け」
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

traits.locale_text: 「さあ...」{n}トラズンは情熱的なジェスチャーで手を挙げ、劇的にポーズをとる.{/n} "...私のミュゼイオンから出て行け。"

languages.text: “现在……”{n}特拉金感情充沛地抬起手，然后戏剧性地一顿。{/n}“……滚出我的大陈列馆。”
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

traits.locale_text: “现在……”{n}特拉金感情充沛地抬起手，然后戏剧性地一顿。{/n}“……滚出我的大陈列馆。”

languages.text: «Ahora...». {n}Trazyn levanta una mano en un gesto vehemente y hace una pausa teatral.{/n} «... Desapareced de mi Museion».
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

traits.locale_text: «Ahora...». {n}Trazyn levanta una mano en un gesto vehemente y hace una pausa teatral.{/n} «... Desapareced de mi Museion».

languages.text: "Und jetzt ..." {n}Trazyn hebt seine Hand zu einer leidenschaftslosen Geste und legt eine theatralische Pause ein.{/n} "... verschwinde aus meinem Museion."
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

traits.locale_text: "Und jetzt ..." {n}Trazyn hebt seine Hand zu einer leidenschaftslosen Geste und legt eine theatralische Pause ein.{/n} "... verschwinde aus meinem Museion."

languages.text: « Et maintenant... » {n}Trazyn lève la main vigoureusement puis marque une pause théâtrale.{/n} « ... quittez mon Muséion. »
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."

traits.locale_text: « Et maintenant... » {n}Trazyn lève la main vigoureusement puis marque une pause théâtrale.{/n} « ... quittez mon Muséion. »

languages.text: "Şimdi..." {n}Trazyn, hararetli bir hareketle elini kaldırıyor ve teatral bir şekilde duraksıyor.{/n} "Museionumdan defolun."
languages.original_text: "Now..." {n}Trazyn raises his hand in an impassioned gesture and pauses theatrically.{/n} "...get out of my Museion."
